fields.label: Latte
fields.steps:
1. Pull a ${selectedSize.ingredient.amount} of espresso.
2. Steam ${selectedSize.ingredient.amount} of milk
3. Pour milk over espresso

fields.label: Iced Latte
fields.steps:
1. Pull a ${selectedSize.ingredient.amount} of espresso
2. Pour ${selectedSize.ingredient.amount} of milk
3. Pour espresso on top of milk
4. Stir
5. Add ice
